info.english_meaning: to kill to destroy to irritate
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: ' hiMsAkaraRayoH SnAvO kfRoti kfRute kfYaH  karoti kurute dve dve sampadyete pade kramAt' (Slo.31) iti devaH
